title: Your Visit
intro: Here is what to expect during your first visit to our clinic.

steps.description: Please book in advance online, by phone, or by email, then visit the clinic.
Please provide your name and reservation details at the front desk.
A doctor or staff member will listen to your concerns and preferences.
steps.note: Same-day treatment may be possible depending on schedule and availability.

steps.description: Your doctor or nurse will explain the treatment details and any important precautions.
Treatment will proceed with your informed consent.
After treatment, you can make your payment and schedule your next visit.
